nasb.text: “You shall not oppress a hired servant who is poor and needy, whether he is one of your countrymen or one of your aliens who is in your land in your towns.

esv.text: “You shall not oppress a hired worker who is poor and needy, whether he is one of your brothers or one of the sojourners who are in your land within your towns.

cnv.text: “困苦貧窮的雇工，無論是你的兄弟，或是寄居在你的地上你的城裡的，你都不可欺壓他。

ccb.text: “不可欺压穷苦的雇工，不论他们是你们的同胞，还是住在你们城中的外族人。
